items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• I need I prefer
• I need to work I prefer my home
• I need to study I prefer my school
• I need to go I prefer my work
• I need to sleep I prefer my city

items.prompt: Eu preciso estudar Eu prefiro minha escola
items.answer: I need to study I prefer my school

items.prompt: Eu preciso ir Eu prefiro meu trabalho
items.answer: I need to go I prefer my work

items.prompt: Eu preciso dormir Eu prefiro minha cidade
items.answer: I need to sleep I prefer my city

items.prompt: Quando você precisa ir lá? Eu gosto muito da mi nha casa
items.answer: When do you need to go there? I like my house ve ry much.

items.text: When do you need to go there? I like my house ve ry much.
I need to work I prefer my home
